title: ipomoea lapathifolia subsp. shabensis
intro: Ipomoea lapathifolia subsp. shabensis, also known as the Egyptian moonflower or Shabu Moonflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the morning glory family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall health. The health benefits of Ipomoea lapathifolia subsp. shabensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves, or by infusing the flowers in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
